_comment: Copy to config.json and adjust output_paths for your system.
simulation_run       — batch control: which seeds to run
simulation_parameters — strip count, belt speed, spawn timing, total frames
density_calculation  — measurement window frames and observation box geometry
output_paths         — where renders and the SQLite database are written
fixed_parameters     — physical scene constants; only change these if you

simulation_run.description: Short label for this batch run.

fixed_parameters._comment: Scene geometry constants — match the values in the .blend file.
